response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior full-stack engineer with 15+ years of experience, solid craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD), and some high-scale exposure at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic, but the profile does not match a Principal IC6 growth/experimentation role. There is no evidence of building experimentation platforms, feature-flagging systems, telemetry/metrics infrastructure, or statistical analysis work, and no demonstrated track record of leading multi-team, multi-workstream initiatives at principal scope. Recent roles are product-focused senior IC positions rather than platform or org-level technical leadership.
strengths: Broad, deep engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and low-latency backend systems (millions of HTTP requests/sec at Sociomantic)
Strong software craftsmanship fundamentals: TDD, pairing, trunk-based development, CI/CD, plus open-source authorship and community teaching
Recent hands-on AI tooling experience (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) aligning with the AI-first emphasis
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flighting, or growth-measurement platform experience — the core domain of the role
No demonstrated principal-level scope: no evidence of architecting systems adopted across multiple teams or leading cross-org initiatives
Limited telemetry/metrics infrastructure and statistical analysis background; data aptitude requirement is unsubstantiated

key_factors.factor: Seniority gap vs Principal IC6 scope
Strong engineering fundamentals and scale exposure
